# G2G OpenAPI

## Docs

- Overview [API Versions](https://docs.g2g.com/api-versions-1237162m0.md): 
- Overview [G2G Official - OpenAPI Sample](https://docs.g2g.com/g2g-official-openapi-sample-1237163m0.md): 
- Overview [Order Status Flow](https://docs.g2g.com/order-status-flow-1237158m0.md): 
- Authentication [Authentication Intro](https://docs.g2g.com/authentication-intro-1237152m0.md): 
- Authentication [Setup API Key](https://docs.g2g.com/setup-api-key-1237153m0.md): 
- Authentication [Verifying Signatures](https://docs.g2g.com/verifying-signatures-1237154m0.md): 
- API Call Flows [Create Offer Flow](https://docs.g2g.com/create-offer-flow-1237155m0.md):

- WEBHOOK > Events [Event Overview](https://docs.g2g.com/event-overview-1237169m0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > AboutWebhooks [Webhooks Intro](https://docs.g2g.com/webhooks-intro-1237164m0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > AboutWebhooks [How Webhooks Work](https://docs.g2g.com/how-webhooks-work-1237165m0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > AboutWebhooks [Setup Webhooks](https://docs.g2g.com/setup-webhooks-1237166m0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > AboutWebhooks [Webhook Resend Policy](https://docs.g2g.com/webhook-resend-policy-1237167m0.md): 
- Release Notes > V2 Breaking Changes [  V2 Breaking Changes](https://docs.g2g.com/-v2-breaking-changes-1237170m0.md): 
- Release Notes > V2 Breaking Changes [Migrate To V2](https://docs.g2g.com/migrate-to-v2-1237171m0.md):

- Release Notes > Changelog > September 2022 [2022-09-06](https://docs.g2g.com/2022-09-06-1237176m0.md): 
- Release Notes > Changelog > September 2022 [2022-09-01](https://docs.g2g.com/2022-09-01-1237178m0.md): 

## API Docs
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Product [Get Services](https://docs.g2g.com/get-services-18583479e0.md): Get list of all available services.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Product [Get Brands](https://docs.g2g.com/get-brands-18583480e0.md): Get brands of a service.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Product [Get Products](https://docs.g2g.com/get-products-18583481e0.md): Get products of a brand.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Product [Get Attributes](https://docs.g2g.com/get-attributes-18583482e0.md): Get attributes of a product.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Product [Post Pricing](https://docs.g2g.com/post-pricing-18583483e0.md): Get recommended pricing for a product.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Offer [Create Offer](https://docs.g2g.com/create-offer-18583484e0.md): Create a new offer.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Offer [Get Offer](https://docs.g2g.com/get-offer-18583485e0.md): Get a specific offer based on offer id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Offer [Update Offer](https://docs.g2g.com/update-offer-18583486e0.md): Update a specific offer based on offer id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Offer [Delete Offer](https://docs.g2g.com/delete-offer-18583487e0.md): Delete a specific offer based on offer id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Offer [Search Offers](https://docs.g2g.com/search-offers-18583488e0.md): Search for a list of offers.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Order [Get Order](https://docs.g2g.com/get-order-18583489e0.md): Get the summary information of your sold order.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Order [Get Deliveries](https://docs.g2g.com/get-deliveries-18583490e0.md): Get delivery info based to specific order id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Order [Deliver Code](https://docs.g2g.com/deliver-code-18583491e0.md): Deliver Codes to specific order when seller received webhook for delivery.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Order [Get Delivery Status](https://docs.g2g.com/get-delivery-status-18583492e0.md): Get the status of your delivery operation.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Order [Patch Delivery](https://docs.g2g.com/patch-delivery-18583493e0.md): Update delivered quantity for manual delivery.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Inventory [Upload Code](https://docs.g2g.com/upload-code-18583494e0.md): Upload code to a specific offer's inventory based on offer id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Inventory [View Code Info](https://docs.g2g.com/view-code-info-18583495e0.md): View code's info of a specific offer's inventory based on offer id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Inventory [Delete Code](https://docs.g2g.com/delete-code-18583496e0.md): Delete code of a specific offer's inventory based on offer id and inventory_id.
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Store [View Store Settings](https://docs.g2g.com/view-store-settings-18583497e0.md): View seller's Store Settings
- APIS (Support Gift Card & Top Up Only) > Log [Search Webhook Logs](https://docs.g2g.com/search-webhook-logs-18583498e0.md): Search webhook logs.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.created](https://docs.g2g.com/order-created-18583499e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.confirmed](https://docs.g2g.com/order-confirmed-18583500e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.delivery_status](https://docs.g2g.com/order-delivery-status-18583501e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.api_delivery](https://docs.g2g.com/order-api-delivery-18583502e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.cancelled](https://docs.g2g.com/order-cancelled-18583503e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.refunded](https://docs.g2g.com/order-refunded-18583504e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.completed](https://docs.g2g.com/order-completed-18583505e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.rollback_cancelled](https://docs.g2g.com/order-rollback-cancelled-18583506e0.md): ⚠️ **Note:** This is a webhook **event** — not a request that your app sends.
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.rollback_completed](https://docs.g2g.com/order-rollback-completed-18583507e0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > Events [order.case_opened](https://docs.g2g.com/order-case-opened-18583508e0.md): 
- WEBHOOK > Events [offer.low_stock](https://docs.g2g.com/offer-low-stock-18583509e0.md):
